# llms.txt — huaxingpcba.com
> PCB manufacturing & assembly for global B2B buyers. ISO 9001 certified factory in China.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://huaxingpcba.com/): PCB manufacturing, assembly, and sourcing overview
- [PCB Manufacturing](https://huaxingpcba.com/pcb): PCB fabrication capabilities, materials, specifications
- [PCB Assembly](https://huaxingpcba.com/pcba): SMT and through-hole assembly services
- [Capabilities](https://huaxingpcba.com/capabilities): Technical specs, certifications, quality control
- [Blog](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog): PCB design guides, industry insights, technical articles
- [Contact](https://huaxingpcba.com/contact): Quote request, factory address

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2015
- Certification: ISO 9001, UL, RoHS
- Capabilities: 1-32 layer PCBs, HDI, rigid-flex, impedance control
- Industries: Automotive, medical, industrial, telecom, consumer electronics
- MOQ: 5 pcs for prototypes
